title: senna uncata
intro: Senna uncata, also known as the wild senna, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of senna uncata include promoting digestive health, relieving constipation, and reducing inflammation, making it a popular natural remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. Senna uncata is often prepared as an herbal tea or infuser by steeping the leaves and pods in hot water, and can also be found in capsule or tincture form.
